basics.name: Felipe A. Santibañez-Leal
basics.summary: Advanced analytics leader with 15+ years bridging academia and industry. I design and deploy data-driven solutions for mining, manufacturing, and services — delivering throughput gains, environmental improvements, and field-data workflow acceleration.

publications.name: HIDSAG: Hyperspectral Image Database for Supervised Analysis in Geometallurgy
publications.summary: Public SWIR/VNIR hyperspectral image database of mineral samples with geometallurgical properties.

publications.name: Ore-Waste Discrimination with Adaptive Sampling Strategy
publications.summary: Adaptive sampling for grade control in short-term mining planning, validated on three real cases.

publications.name: Sampling Strategies for Uncertainty Reduction in Categorical Random Fields
publications.summary: Information-theoretic optimal sampling using conditional entropy for geostatistical simulation.

publications.name: Geological Facies Recovery Based on Weighted l1-Regularization
publications.summary: Weighted compressed sensing for channelized geological facies reconstruction.

publications.name: A Robust Stochastic Approach to Mineral Hyperspectral Analysis for Geometallurgy
